message:
Command `# openroad-globalrouting.log is 0 bytes and no state_out.json yet - step 32 is running
# The pnr_v4.log shows GRT output. GlobalRouting is actively running.
# Let's wait longer - GRT can take 20-40 min for a complex design
sleep 600
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_v4.log` executed with exit code 0.
